steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: Sentence 1 says ticker tape had long since been retired by 1986. Sentence 2 says shredded standard paper enriched the celebration. The relationship is temporal consequence: because ticker tape was gone, something else followed.

steps.title: Apply the rule: choose the transition that fits the logical relationship
steps.content:
• Choice A — In addition,: "In addition, shredded standard paper enriched..." — signals an additional fact piled on, not a replacement or consequence. Ticker tape retired + paper added would need contrast, not addition. ✗
  • Choice B — In other words,: "In other words, shredded standard paper enriched..." — signals a restatement of the same idea. Shredded paper is not a rephrasing of retiring ticker tape. ✗
  • Choice C — With this in mind,: "With this in mind, shredded standard paper enriched..." — signals a deliberate decision made in light of prior information; there is no reasoning or deliberation implied. ✗
  • Choice D — Then,: "Then, shredded standard paper enriched the celebration." — signals what happened next as a temporal consequence: ticker tape was gone, so then paper took its place. ✓
D is correct.
